name: tiltcheck-channel-watcher
description: On-demand Discord channel scraper — batch collects messages since last checkpoint, runs GPT-4o pain point analysis, and exits

scripts.token:get: node --input-type=module -e "import {readFileSync} from 'fs'; try { const s=JSON.parse(readFileSync('.session.json','utf8')); const o=s.origins?.find(o=>o.origin.includes('discord.com')); const t=o?.localStorage?.find(l=>l.name==='token'); if(t) { console.log('\nYour DISCORD_TOKEN (paste this into Railway):\n'); console.log(JSON.parse(t.value)); } else { console.log('No token found in .session.json. Run npm run session:create first.'); } } catch(e) { console.log('No .session.json found. Run npm run session:create first.'); }"
